title: Equifax: Credit Bureau Giant Turning The Tide Of Adversity
text: Equifax is expected to see accelerated free cash flow growth despite a downturn in the mortgage market and the aftermath of a massive data breach in 2017. The credit bureau's non-mortgage business is projected to continue growing at a rate of 8-12% over the long term, with Workforce Solutions being a major driver. Equifax's financial targets of 7-9% organic sales growth and 12-16% EPS growth, along with a fair value of $269, make it an attractive investment for long-term investors.

title: Equifax Inc. (EFX) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Equifax Inc. title: Equifax Cuts Its Guidance Because of Soft Mortgage Market, and Shares Sink
text: Shares of Equifax plunged as the credit rating service slashed its full-year sales and profit outlook, blaming a weak mortgage market.

title: Compared to Estimates, Equifax (EFX) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Equifax (EFX) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Equifax (EFX) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates
text: Equifax (EFX) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.71 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.67 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.09 per share a year ago.

title: Equifax blames weak mortgage market for reduced earnings outlook, stock falls
text: Equifax Inc. called out a weaker mortgage market Wednesday as it trimmed its outlook for the full year.

title: Equifax Delivers Solid Second Quarter in Challenging Mortgage Market
text: ATLANTA , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) today announced financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2023. Second quarter 2023 revenue of $1.318 billion was flat and up 1% in constant currency against a mortgage market estimated to be down 37%.

title: Here's What to Expect From Equifax's (EFX) Q2 Earnings
text: Weakening mortgage markets along with softness in the U.S. and global economy are expected to act as headwinds for Equifax (EFX) in the second quarter of 2023.

title: Equifax Announces Earnings Release Date and Conference Call for Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: ATLANTA , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Equifax ® (NYSE: EFX) will announce its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023 in a release to be issued on July 19 after the market closes.  Equifax will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m.
